// About Me

Who Am I?

I'm Pravinsankar A.G, a final-year B.E. Computer Science student at Vellalar College of Engineering and Technology, graduating in 2026.

I specialize in Java development with strong foundations in OOP, Data Structures & Algorithms, and database integration. I've built production-grade applications featuring CRUD operations, file persistence, and MySQL integration via JDBC.

I'm passionate about writing clean, scalable code and actively seeking opportunities to apply and expand my technical expertise in a real-world environment.
